blockingIssues.description: README.md documents the internal compiler phases instead of the requested final validation/acceptance workflow, omitting the flake-backed validation commands from .factory/services.yaml and the downstream acceptance checks exercised by the codegen suite and validation contract (`gofmt`, `go build`, `go vet`, `go run`, including the final MVP acceptance program).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Avoid assigning docs-only features such as README refreshes to the `compiler-worker` skill, or document an explicit documentation-only exception in that skill so workers are not forced to violate its tests-first procedure.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `final-readme-refresh` feature in mission-wrapup was assigned `compiler-worker`, whose procedure requires tests-first implementation. The feature handoff explicitly noted skipping that step because the task only changed README.md, and the reviewer flagged the mismatch as a shared-state observation.
